basics.name: Mansi Sonani
basics.label: AI Automation Developer & Prompt Engineer
basics.tagline: Building autonomous multi-agent systems and hyper-efficient n8n workflows that turn weeks of manual development into seconds of AI execution.
basics.summary: AI Automation Developer specializing in multi-agent systems, n8n workflows, and production-grade LLM integration. Renowned for building Synapse-AI, a 5-agent autonomous B2B integration platform that slashed development times from 3 weeks to 25 seconds.

experience.summary: Providing end-to-end architecture, development, and deployment of production AI systems for global clients.
highlights: Built and successfully deployed 6 production AI systems, managing the complete project lifecycle.
Specialized in constructing complex multi-agent workflows using LangGraph and n8n.
Authored meticulous public open-source code repositories with architectural diagrams and documentation.

education.institution: Swami Sahajanand College of Computer Science, Bhavnagar, Gujarat

certifications.name: Microsoft AI Skills Fest 2025 (50-Day Coding Challenge)
